title: OLD TOWN RECOVERY CENTER - 211info
text: OLD TOWN CLINIC OLD TOWN RECOVERY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Central City Concern Old Town Recovery Center is a state licensed, outpatient mental health and addiction treatment program. Services include case management, counseling, addictions treatment, co-occurring disorder treatment, housing access/eviction prevention (for clients only), access to medical professionals (for clients only), and medication prescribing and management. 726 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals with severe and persistent mental illness and/or substance abuse issues Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Walk in: Monady-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 228-4533 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-4533 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or walk in FEES: OHP, Family Care, Care Oregon, Health Share DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm Services: Medication Information/Management Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - OLD TOWN CLINIC SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
